since_last: 57% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +5.47%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.16% · BTC +0.47% · Gold +1.46% · Nasdaq100 -0.60%. 57% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +5.47%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +5.47%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +8.95%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +8.95%, APP +7.91%, PUBM +7.56%, DV +7.24%, WDAY +7.15%. Laggards: TER -7.82%, NXPI -6.54%, VRT -6.51%, HPE -6.18%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.43% at $155.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
